description: The vault gate is not a door so much as a verdict. Its scanner is cracked, its guards are nervous, and every route here has left a trace.

options.text: Wait for a shift change and force your way through the confusion.
options.summary_consequence: Reached the vault through costly survival instead of build leverage.

options.text: Use the disabled scanner loop to trigger a technical override.
options.locked_text: You need both technical skill and a prior scanner opening to make this look like a system fault.
options.summary_consequence: Old-world systems opened because the player understood and prepared them.

options.text: Cash in your market contact and walk through under a borrowed name.
options.locked_text: The guards are ready to believe someone, but no one here is ready to believe you.
options.summary_consequence: The player lied their way into a system built on trust.

options.text: Let the gate crew understand which raider debt follows you.
options.locked_text: A threat without recognized history is just noise at the vault gate.
options.summary_consequence: Violent credibility opened the gate but changed how survivors remember the player.

options.text: Use your clean checkpoint record to enter under medical clearance.
options.locked_text: The medical lane exists, but your earlier choices left you without a clean record.
options.summary_consequence: Earlier safe clinic and checkpoint choices created a nonviolent vault entry.
